headline: CME Group (CME) to Launch Single Stock Futures on July 27
summary: CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) is one of the 9 Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stocks to Invest In Now. On June 30, 2026, CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) said it will launch Single Stock futures across more than 50 top U.S. stocks on July 27, pending completion of all regulatory review and processes. The new offering will […]
